name: cielovista-tools
description: CieloVistaSoftware developer toolkit — Copilot utilities, terminal helpers, CSS hover, Python runner, OpenAI chat, and more. One install, one extension.

scripts.rebuild: npm run compile && npm run test:mcp-packaging && npm run test:mcp-status && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:regression && npm run copy:commandhelp && npm run package && npm run test:mcp-vsix && node install.js && node tests/install-verify.test.js && npm run validate:package-json
scripts.test:all: node tests/catalog-integrity.test.js && node tests/command-validation.test.js && node tests/doc-catalog.test.js && node tests/launcher-script.test.js && node tests/launcher-test-coverage.test.js && node tests/unit/background-health-runner.test.js && node tests/unit/webview-utils.test.js && node tests/unit/docs-audit-utils.test.js && node tests/unit/error-log.test.js && node tests/unit/error-log-utils.test.js && node tests/unit/shared-source.test.js && node tests/unit/doc-auditor-analyzer.test.js && node tests/unit/doc-auditor-scanner.test.js && node tests/unit/feature-toggle.test.js && node tests/unit/doc-header.test.js && node tests/unit/license-sync.test.js && node tests/unit/readme-compliance.test.js && node tests/unit/js-error-audit.test.js && node tests/unit/codebase-auditor.test.js && node tests/unit/marketplace-compliance.test.js && node tests/unit/doc-consolidator.test.js && node tests/unit/daily-audit-checks.test.js && node tests/unit/thin-features.test.js && node tests/unit/github-issues-view-ui.test.js && node tests/regression/REG-001-extension-activation.test.js && node tests/test-coverage-commands.integration.test.js
scripts.pretest: npm run clean && npm run compile
scripts.clean: pwsh -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'out' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path 'dist' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path '*.vsix' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"

commands.title: Open Home Dashboard
commands.description: Open the main CieloVista Tools home webview with all features and documentation.

commands.title: Commands: Open Guided Launcher
commands.description: Show a searchable picker of all CieloVista Tools commands in the status bar.

commands.title: Commands: Quick Run (quick pick)
commands.description: Quickly run any CieloVista Tools command from a quick pick menu.

commands.title: Open Home Project Folder
commands.description: Open your configured CieloVista home project root in VS Code.

commands.title: NPM Scripts: Show and Run
commands.description: Show all npm scripts in the workspace and run any script instantly.

commands.title: NPM Scripts: Add/Edit Description
commands.description: Add or edit a custom description for any npm script in your workspace.

commands.title: Copilot Rules: Enable
commands.description: Enable Copilot rules enforcement for this workspace. Injects copilot-rules.md into workspace settings.

commands.title: Copilot Rules: Disable
commands.description: Disable Copilot rules enforcement and remove rules from workspace settings.

commands.title: Copilot Rules: Reload from File
commands.description: Reload copilot-rules.md and re-apply updated rules to the workspace.

commands.title: Copilot Rules: View Current
commands.description: Open a webview showing your current Copilot rules and enforcement status.

commands.title: Copilot: Open Suggested File
commands.description: Open a file path mentioned by Copilot directly in the editor.

commands.title: Terminal: Copy Output to Clipboard
commands.description: Copy the output of the most recent terminal command to the clipboard.

commands.title: Terminal: Paste Output to Chat
commands.description: Paste the last terminal command output directly into Copilot Chat.

commands.title: Terminal: Paste Last Command to Chat
commands.description: Paste the most recent terminal command line directly into Copilot Chat.

commands.title: Terminal: Set Working Directory
commands.description: Right-click a folder to instantly cd the terminal to that folder.

commands.title: Terminal: Jump to Last Known Folder
commands.description: Jump the terminal to the last folder you cd'd to, even after restart.

commands.title: Terminal: Toggle Prompt Length
commands.description: Toggle the PowerShell prompt between full path and minimal form.

commands.title: CSS Class Hover: Enable
commands.description: Show CSS rule definitions in a hover popup for class names in HTML/JSX/TSX.

commands.title: Python: Run File in Terminal
commands.description: Run any .py file in the terminal using the configured Python interpreter.

commands.title: HTML Template: Download
commands.description: Download HTML starter templates from the CieloVista GitHub repository.

commands.title: HTML Template: Open Clipboard Path
commands.description: Open the file or folder path currently on the clipboard in Explorer.

commands.title: OpenAI: Explain Code
commands.description: Use OpenAI to explain the selected code in natural language.

commands.title: OpenAI: Refactor Code
commands.description: Use OpenAI to suggest refactoring for the selected code.

commands.title: OpenAI: Generate Docstring
commands.description: Generate a JSDoc docstring for the selected code using OpenAI.

commands.title: OpenAI: Open Chat Panel
commands.description: Open a persistent chat panel powered by OpenAI.

commands.title: Docs: Open Global Standards Doc
commands.description: Open a global standards documentation file from the registry.

commands.title: Docs: Open Project Doc
commands.description: Open a documentation file from a specific project.

commands.title: Docs: New Global Standards Doc
commands.description: Create a new global standards documentation file.

commands.title: Docs: New Project Doc
commands.description: Create a new documentation file in a specific project.

commands.title: Docs: Search All Docs
commands.description: Search all documentation files across all projects and global standards.

commands.title: Docs: Sync Check (missing CLAUDE.md etc)
commands.description: Check for missing required documentation files like CLAUDE.md.

commands.title: Docs: Open Project Registry
commands.description: Open the master project registry JSON file.

commands.title: Docs: Add Project to Registry
commands.description: Add a new project entry to the documentation registry.

commands.title: Docs: Scan Broken References
commands.description: Detect missing images and dead markdown links with candidate target paths.

commands.title: Audit: Run Full Docs Audit
commands.description: Run a full audit of all documentation for duplicates, orphans, and compliance.

commands.title: Audit: Find Duplicate Doc Filenames
commands.description: Find documentation files with duplicate filenames.

commands.title: Audit: Find Similar Content
commands.description: Find documentation files with similar content.

commands.title: Audit: Find Orphaned Docs
commands.description: Find documentation files that are not referenced anywhere.

commands.title: Audit: Merge Docs Together
commands.description: Merge multiple documentation files into one.

commands.title: Audit: Move Doc to Global Standards
commands.description: Move a documentation file to the global standards folder.

commands.title: Audit: Open Past Audit Report
commands.description: Open a previously generated documentation audit report.

commands.title: Audit: Run Daily Health Check
commands.description: Run a daily health check audit on documentation.

commands.title: Docs: Intelligence — Unified Scan & Fix
commands.description: Unified scan and fix for documentation issues.

commands.title: Audit: Act on Audit Report
commands.description: Take action on findings from a documentation audit report.

commands.title: Audit: Walk Through Findings
commands.description: Interactively walk through audit findings and resolve them.

commands.title: Audit: Test Coverage Dashboard
commands.description: Open the test coverage audit dashboard for your project.

commands.title: Audit: Refresh Test Coverage
commands.description: Refresh the test coverage data in the audit dashboard.

commands.title: Audit: Export Coverage Report
commands.description: Export the current test coverage report as a markdown file.

commands.title: Consolidate: Run Full Consolidation Wizard
commands.description: Run the full wizard to consolidate duplicate documentation files.

commands.title: Consolidate: By Filename (same name)
commands.description: Consolidate documentation files with the same filename.

commands.title: Consolidate: By Content (similar docs)
commands.description: Consolidate documentation files with similar content.

commands.title: Consolidate: Open Consolidation Log
commands.description: Open the log of all documentation consolidation actions.

commands.title: Catalog: Open Doc Card Catalog
commands.description: Open the documentation card catalog for browsing.

commands.title: Catalog: Rebuild Doc Catalog
commands.description: Rebuild the documentation card catalog from all docs.

commands.title: Catalog: View a Doc (quick pick)
commands.description: Quick pick to view any documentation card in the catalog.

commands.title: Catalog: View Archived Docs
commands.description: Browse archived documents and restore any to the catalog.

commands.title: README: Scan Compliance
commands.description: Scan all projects for README compliance.

commands.title: README: Fix a Non-Compliant README
commands.description: Fix a single non-compliant README file.

commands.title: README: Fix All Non-Compliant READMEs
commands.description: Fix all non-compliant README files in all projects.

commands.title: README: View README Standard
commands.description: View the standard template for compliant README files.

commands.title: README: New Compliant README from Template
commands.description: Create a new compliant README file from the standard template.

commands.title: README: Scan for Missing READMEs
commands.description: Scan all projects for missing README files.

commands.title: README: Generate All Missing READMEs (AI)
commands.description: Use AI to generate all missing README files in the workspace.

commands.title: README: Generate Single README (AI)
commands.description: Use AI to generate a single missing README file.

commands.title: Marketplace: Scan Compliance
commands.description: Scan all projects for marketplace compliance issues.

commands.title: Marketplace: Fix All Auto-Fixable Issues
commands.description: Automatically fix all marketplace compliance issues that can be auto-fixed.

commands.title: Marketplace: Fix One Project
commands.description: Fix marketplace compliance issues for a single project.

commands.title: Headers: Scan Doc Header Compliance
commands.description: Scan documentation files for header/frontmatter compliance.

commands.title: Headers: Add/Fix All Headers
commands.description: Add or fix headers in all documentation files.

commands.title: Headers: Fix Headers in One Project
commands.description: Fix headers in documentation files for a single project.

commands.title: Headers: Fix Header in Current File
commands.description: Fix the header/frontmatter in the currently open documentation file.

commands.title: Headers: View Frontmatter Standard
commands.description: View the standard for documentation file headers/frontmatter.

commands.title: Launch: Pick Any Project Action
commands.description: Pick and run any project action from a quick pick menu.

commands.title: Launch: SnapIt — Start Service
commands.description: Start the SnapIt service for project screenshots.

commands.title: Launch: SnapIt — Launch Tray
commands.description: Launch the SnapIt tray application.

commands.title: Launch: SnapIt — Rebuild + Launch Tray
commands.description: Rebuild and launch the SnapIt tray application.

commands.title: Launch: SnapIt — Build
commands.description: Build the SnapIt tray application.

commands.title: Launch: SnapIt — Stop (kill port 5200)
commands.description: Stop the SnapIt service and free port 5200.

commands.title: Launch: DiskCleanUp — Start Service
commands.description: Start the DiskCleanUp service for project maintenance.

commands.title: Launch: DiskCleanUp — Console Mode
commands.description: Launch DiskCleanUp in console mode.

commands.title: Launch: DiskCleanUp — Build
commands.description: Build the DiskCleanUp application.

commands.title: Launch: DiskCleanUp — Stop (kill port 5100)
commands.description: Stop the DiskCleanUp service and free port 5100.

commands.title: MCP Server: Create
commands.description: Create a new Model Context Protocol (MCP) server project.

commands.title: MCP Server: Start/Stop
commands.description: Start or stop the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

commands.title: Explorer: Open Folder as Root
commands.description: Open a folder as the root in the VS Code Explorer.

commands.title: Features: Configure Enabled
commands.description: Configure which CieloVista Tools features are enabled.

commands.title: License: Sync All Projects
commands.description: Sync license information across all projects.

commands.title: Audit: Codebase Health
commands.description: Audit the health of your codebase for issues and improvements.

commands.title: Config: Edit CieloVista Tools Config
commands.description: Open the config editor for all CieloVista Tools settings and options.

commands.title: Audit: Code Block Highlight Audit
commands.description: Audit code blocks for proper syntax highlighting.

commands.title: Audit: JS Error Handling Audit
commands.description: Audit JavaScript error handling in your codebase.

commands.title: Health: Fix Bugs (Background Runner)
commands.description: Run background health checks and automatically fix bugs.

commands.title: Tools: Error Log Viewer
commands.description: Open the error log viewer for CieloVista Tools.

commands.title: Tools: Regression Log Viewer
commands.description: Open the regression log viewer - review regressions, file as issues, mark fixed with release version.

commands.title: Tools: FileList
commands.description: Open the FileList viewer — a sortable, table-based alternative to the Explorer tree (Name, Date modified, Type, Size).

commands.title: Claude: Process Monitor
commands.description: Open the Claude Process Monitor — view all running Claude instances, memory usage, uptime, and which program opened each one. Kill any instance at will.

commands.title: Image Reader: Open Panel
commands.description: Open the Image Reader webview panel.

commands.title: MCP Viewer: Open Endpoint Viewer
commands.description: Open the MCP Endpoint Viewer in the system browser. Live viewer for list_projects, find_project, search_docs, and get_catalog.

commands.title: Explorer: Copy File Path to Copilot Chat
commands.description: Right-click a file in Explorer and add its absolute path to Copilot Chat input.

commands.title: Editor: Copy JSON to Copilot Chat
commands.description: Right-click while editing a .json file to send that file's JSON content to Copilot Chat input.

commands.title: Registry: Promote Folder to Product
commands.description: Register a folder as a CieloVista product. Scaffolds CLAUDE.md and README.md if missing, appends an entry to project-registry.json with status=product.

cielovistaTools.copilotRulesEnforcer.aut.description: Apply rules automatically on workspace open.

cielovistaTools.homeProjectPath.description: Absolute path to your CieloVista home project root used by 'Project: Open Home'.

cielovistaTools.npmScriptDescriptions.description: Map of custom descriptions for npm scripts. Keys use 'relative-package-json-path::script-name'. Prefer editing via command: 'NPM Scripts: Add/Edit Description'.

cielovistaTools.anthropic.apiKey.description: Anthropic API key — used for AI-powered README fixes and generation. Store in User settings, never workspace.

cielovistaTools.openai.apiKey.description: OpenAI API key — store in User settings, never workspace.

cielovistaTools.features.copilotRulesEnf.description: Enable the Copilot Rules Enforcer feature.

cielovistaTools.features.copilotOpenSugg.description: Enable the Copilot Open Suggested File feature.

cielovistaTools.features.terminalCopyOut.description: Enable the Terminal Copy Output feature.

cielovistaTools.features.terminalSetFold.description: Enable the Terminal Set Folder feature.

cielovistaTools.features.terminalFolderT.description: Enable the Terminal Folder Tracker feature.

cielovistaTools.features.terminalPromptS.description: Enable the Terminal Prompt Shortener feature.

cielovistaTools.features.cssClassHover.description: Enable the CSS Class Hover feature.

cielovistaTools.features.htmlTemplateDow.description: Enable the HTML Template Downloader feature.

cielovistaTools.features.cvsCommandLaunc.description: Enable the CVS Command Launcher feature.

cielovistaTools.features.projectHomeOpen.description: Enable the Project Home Opener feature.

cielovistaTools.features.npmCommandLaunc.description: Enable the NPM Command Launcher feature.

cielovistaTools.features.mcpServerScaffo.description: Enable the MCP Server Scaffolder feature.

cielovistaTools.features.openFolderAsRoo.description: Enable the Open Folder as Root feature.

cielovistaTools.features.explorerCopyPat.description: Enable the Explorer Copy Path to Copilot Chat feature.

cielovistaTools.features.jsonCopyToChat.description: Enable the Editor: Copy JSON to Copilot Chat feature.

cielovistaTools.features.mcpViewer.description: Enable the MCP Endpoint Viewer feature.

cielovistaTools.features.registryPromote.description: Enable the Registry Promote feature — right-click a folder to register it as a CieloVista product.
